**Vulnerability description**
What security issue should the new rule detect?

**Example vulnerable workflow**
```yaml
# Paste an example of a workflow that exhibits this vulnerability
```

**Reference**
Link to advisory, CVE, research paper, or GitHub Security Lab article that documents this vulnerability.

**Suggested rule ID**
e.g. GASV-XXX-001

**OWASP CICD-SEC category** (if applicable)
e.g. CICD-SEC-4
